g.text: # Store batch size, sequence length, model dimension
# Calculate query, key, values for all heads in batch
# (B, S, D) x (D, 3D) -> (B, S, 3D) -> 3 separate (B, S, D)

text.font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: # Split out and transpose head forward next to the batch dim
# (B, S, D) -> (B, H, S, d_k) where d_k = D / H

text.tspan: q = q.view(B, S, self.n_head, D // self.n_head).transpose(

text.font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

text.tspan: k = k.view(B, S, self.n_head, D // self.n_head).transpose(

text.font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

text.tspan: v = v.view(B, S, self.n_head, D // self.n_head).transpose(
